business.name: North Star Outfitters
business.tagline: Outdoor apparel and camping gear for North American adventurers.

policies.title: Returns
policies.content: We accept returns within 30 days. Items must be unused and in their original packaging. Start a return any time at our returns page — we'll email you a prepaid label and your refund is issued once we receive the item.

policies.title: Exchanges
policies.content: Exchanges follow the same 30-day window. Items must be unused and in original packaging. To exchange for a different size or color (subject to availability), start the request at our returns page and note that you'd like an exchange.

policies.title: Shipping
policies.content: Standard shipping takes 3–5 business days. Expedited shipping takes 1–2 business days.

faqs.question: How do I track my order?
faqs.answer: Just share your order number here and I'll pull up the current status.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: Returns are accepted within 30 days for unused items in their original packaging. You can start one at our returns page.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping is 3–5 business days; expedited is 1–2 business days.
